name: qubo-solver
summary: A Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) solver library using quantum and classical approaches.
author_email: Manu Lahariya <manu.lahariya@pasqal.com>, Charles Moussa <c.moussa@pasqal.com>, Yassine Naghmouchi <yassine.naghmouchi@pasqal.com>, Quentin Ma <quentin.ma@pasqal.com>, Monique Garzillo <monique.garzillo@pasqal.com>, Daniele Cucurachi <daniele.cucurachi@pasqal.com>, Clément de Terrasson de Montleau <clement.de-terrasson@pasqal.com>
